IntentDefinitions.description: Get brands, drug class, and presentations for an antibiotic

responses.postText: Disclaimer: Antibiotics require a valid prescription from a licensed healthcare provider before use.

IntentDefinitions.description: Redirects user to proper medical guidance when the query requires clinical interpretation, dosing advice, or monitoring instructions that must be handled by a healthcare provider.

responseTexts: Patients may need monitoring such as heart rate checks and blood tests, and medication schedule or dosage frequency should be confirmed with your doctor; always consult your healthcare provider for proper dosing and condition-based instructions.

Heart rate monitoring and blood test effects may be required depending on your condition, and the correct schedule or number of doses must be guided by a doctor, so consult your healthcare provider for safe and proper use.

Some treatments require monitoring of heart rate and blood results, along with specific dosing schedules, therefore you should always consult your doctor for your condition, dosage, and medication instructions.
